docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-11-2023 - CONTINUED FOR FURTHER EVIDENCE TO OCT-30-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF TOM TANG IS PRESENT WITH WITNESSES KRISS MIRANDA AND PATRICIA TANG. DEFENDANT JAMES MURPHY IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS LINDA MURPHY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $139. SERVED JUL-31-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MURPHY, JAMES

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-11-2023 - CONTINUED DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT'S CALENDAR TO OCT-11-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO HEARING IS HELD. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. KANE. D.506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF TOM TANG IS PRESENT WITH WITNESSES PATTY TANG, KRISS MIRANDA, AND DARIUS HOUSHIARNEJAD (VIA ZOOM). DEFENDANT JAMES MURPHY IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS STEVEN MURPHY. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAS NO CLAIM FOR ATTORNEY FEES ASSOCIATED WITH CASE CCH-23-585831, AND ALSO HAS NO CLAIM ON LOST RENT FROM DARIUS HOUSHIARNEJAD FOR MAY, JUNE AND JULY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER FILED BY TANG, TOM MURPHY, JAMES
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY TANG, TOM AS TO DEFENDANT MURPHY, JAMES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER TO CONTINUE TRIAL FOR FURTHER EVIDENCE
